headline: Peas 8 days from target — heat toughens pods fast
weather_notes: Secure e1–e4 tomato cages before noon — 32 mph gusts arriving this afternoon with 40% storm chance.
Pick c2–c4 peas no later than Wednesday — 85°F heat through Thursday toughens pods fast with harvest just 8 days out.
Water potato_bags Thursday — two consecutive 85°F days after yesterday's irrigation will drain bag soil by then.

suggested_tasks.title: Pick c2–c4 peas before Wednesday heat
suggested_tasks.description: Pods forming heavily since May 12; harvest target June 3 and 85°F heat Wed–Thu toughens unpicked pods daily.

suggested_tasks.title: Deep water the peach tree Thursday
suggested_tasks.description: Logged struggling May 23; two 85°F days hit before Thursday when Rachio's last run (May 25) will be 3 days old.
